# Copilot Instructions

## File Reading

- When reading any file, read the entire file, not just the changed lines.
- When using a tool that supports `endLine`, set it high enough to cover the full file.
- Apply the ssame full-file reading rule to code, design-system docs, and skill files.

## About Me Experience

- When building or refining the About Me experience, aim for a dynamic personal site instead of a static one-page resume.
- Prefer a result that feels like a living personal website, not a generic resume dump.
- Keep the experience fancy, professional, and editorial in tone.
- Emphasize clear hierarchy, strong typography, subtle motion, and deliberate spacing.

## Required Skills

- Use both the `carbon-design-system` skill and the `about-me-design` skill together when creating or refining the About Me page.
- Use the `about-me-design` skill for page structure, storytelling, layout, and visual direction.
- Use the `carbon-design-system` skill for component choice, props, and implementation details.

## Core Page Structure

- Include a header or hero with name, title, and a clear point of view.
- Include a summary section with a brief introduction.
- Include an experience section with past roles and responsibilities.
- Include a skills section with technical strengths.
- Include a projects section with notable work.
- Include a contact section with social links and email.

## Optional Extensions

- If the content supports it, add dynamic supporting areas such as featured writing, bookmarks, recommendations, or filters for projects and experience.
